change_request: A written done-line is FROZEN — it is the contract you set before the work, and no session edits it in place (§9.4; the log's own rule: never edit a line, only append). You do NOT get to change what done meant — not in place, not by superseding, not pending a stamp. That would be a free 'stop working' card: a new, easier bar you wrote for yourself. If the bar is genuinely wrong, name it in your report's needs-you and KEEP WORKING. Moving a done-line is bdo's alone — python -m loop.pen supersede-done ... --by bdo refuses every other signer and writes nothing; he abandons the old bar additively and reflects on why, if he agrees with you. Until then, the bar you set is the bar. Complete tasks and mark them done.
scaffold: Written before code, per §9.4. When this line is met, stop.
> **Done when:** <the one line that, when true, means stop>
